policies.name: CA-07 Extracted Policy CA-07
policies.description: 점검 내용 단일 가상 네트워크 내 Public/Private 서브넷을 혼용하여 사용하는지 여부 점검
policies.source: 주요정보통신기반시설 기술적 취약점 분석·평가 방법 상세가이드 CA-0708.pdf
policies.yaml:
---
metadata:
  id: CKV2_CUSTOM_CA_07_481018
  name: "CA-07 Extracted Policy CA-07"
  category: GENERAL_SECURITY
  severity: MEDIUM
  guideline: "Ensure that public and private subnets are separated by configuring distinct network resources for each."
scope:
  provider: aws
definition:
  resource_types:
    - aws_route_table
    - aws_route_table_association
    - aws_subnet
  checks:
    -
      name: "ensure public and private subnets are separated"
      comment: "Verify that public subnets are associated with an Internet Gateway and private subnets are associated with a NAT Gateway."
      and:
        -
          not:
            cond_type: attribute
            resource_types:
              - aws_subnet
            attribute: map_public_ip_on_launch
            operator: exists
        -
          cond_type: connection
          resource_types:
            - aws_route_table
            - aws_route_table_association
          connected_resource_type: aws_internet_gateway
          operator: exists
        -
          cond_type: connection
          resource_types:
            - aws_route_table
            - aws_route_table_association
          connected_resource_type: aws_nat_gateway
          operator: exists

policies.name: CA-08 Extracted Policy CA-08
policies.description: 점검 목적 각 서비스에서 내부 네트워크만 사용하는 리소스에 공용 IP주소를 제거하고, 서비스 역할에 맞게 권한을
policies.source: 주요정보통신기반시설 기술적 취약점 분석·평가 방법 상세가이드 CA-0708.pdf
policies.yaml:
---
metadata:
  id: CKV2_CUSTOM_CA_08_DISABLE_PUBLIC_IP_478675
  name: "CA-08 Extracted Policy CA-08"
  category: NETWORKING
  severity: HIGH
  guideline: "Ensure that database instances are not publicly accessible."
scope:
  provider: aws
definition:
  resource_types:
    - aws_db_instance
  attribute: publicly_accessible
  equals: false
